verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father, I see a bride rejoicing In the song of victory every scheme of death is broken They have been set free Satan's Kingdom is defeated Let our worship ring Praise to our Lord, Glory to our King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the worshippers arise Let the sons and the daughters sing I'm surrendering my all I surrender to the King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Father I see a bride in Power With full Authority She is claiming every promise And believing what she speaks Every weapon formed against her Has fallen at her feet Oh hear her praise, to the King of kings
